description_long: This object consists of two stylized humanoid dolls standing side by side and holding hands. Both figures have a blocky, cartoon-like appearance with smooth surfaces and simplified facial features, including large smiles and dot eyes. The left doll has short, tousled brown hair and wears a brown shirt with the word 'COWGIRL' printed on it, paired with brown pants and white shoes. The right doll features long, wavy brown hair adorned with two large bows, fluffy earmuffs, a matching brown top, brown pants, and white shoes. The dolls' clothing and accessories are rendered in a cohesive brown and white color palette, and their limbs are articulated at the shoulders and hips. The overall design is playful and modern, suitable for display or imaginative play in urban environments.
description: A pair of stylized, brown-themed humanoid dolls holding hands, featuring coordinated outfits and playful accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing both dolls' faces, clothing details, and hand-holding gesture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of both dolls, with visible hair texture and earmuffs on the right doll.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dolls' heads, hair arrangements, and the connection of their hands.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the profile of both dolls, with the right doll's bows and hair volume visible.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual coordinated outfits with brown short-sleeve tops, one featuring 'COWGIRL' text, paired with brown pants and white shoes; the right doll has earmuffs and large hair bows, evoking a playful, modern streetwear influence.
attribute_pose: Both dolls are standing upright, holding hands; arms are slightly bent at the elbows, legs are straight with one foot of each doll slightly forward, and heads are facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Both dolls have smiling expressions with wide, curved mouths and simple dot eyes, conveying a cheerful and friendly demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Left doll: short, tousled brown hair; right doll: long, wavy brown hair styled with two large bows and parted in the middle.
